name: Ingrid Jensen
abstract: Ingrid Jensen (born January 12, 1966) is a Canadian jazz trumpeter.

concerts.label: Artemis
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Michael Abene
about_quotes.evidence: Right now Rufus Reid, Billy Hart, Ingrid Jensen is doing it, Dick Oatts on saxophone. So we’re looking to record in May.
about_quotes.doc_title: Michael Abene interviewed by Monk Rowe, Toronto, Canada, January 11, 2003

about_quotes.speaker: Lisa Parrott
about_quotes.evidence: There’s another group I play with too... the front line Ingrid Jensen, Virginia Mayhew...
about_quotes.doc_title: Lisa Parrott interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 22, 2021

about_quotes.speaker: Terri Lyne Carrington
about_quotes.evidence: Gary Thomas, Mike Formanek, Ingrid Jensen and I hope Renee Rosnes.
about_quotes.doc_title: Terri Lyne Carrington interviewed by Monk Rowe, Toronto, Canada, January 9, 2003

about_quotes.speaker: Von Freeman
about_quotes.evidence: Now, anytime I hear Ingrid [Jensen] play, I can’t believe her.
about_quotes.doc_title: Von Freeman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
